Our Premium Nutritional Supplement Suppliers

Natural Factors - For over 40 years Natural Factors has been a leader in North America's health products industry. "Our aim is to harvest, create and distribute the purest, most health enhancing products in the world". - Roland Gahler, President. (Official site)

Whole Earth and Sea - Raw whole food supplements produced by Natural Factors. Uses Farm Fresh Factors and other whole food sources. We process nutrient-dense plants raw to create a vital bioenergetic blend vitamins, minerals, enzymes, and phytonutrients. (Official site)

Sisu  - For 30 years, SISU has been at the forefront of the natural health products industry. Our commitment to the quality and efficacy of our products has established our reputation for excellence among health-conscious consumers.(Official site)

Preferred Nutrition - Is dedicated to helping people reach their health potential and has set its vision to create and distribute the highest quality unique health products including Brad King, W. Gifford-Jones, MD, Julian Whitaker, WomenSense™ and Preferred Nutrition.(Official site)

New Roots - The company's mission is to produce the most therapeutic nutraceutical formulas designed for the prevention and cure of disease. (Official site)

Information and Resources

Doctor Murray - Your Natural Medicine Resource.

Fresh Health - Dr. Jennifer Brix, ND

Doctor Marita - Doctor of Naturopathic Medicine, Women's Health Expert, Educator and Author.

Julie Daniluk - TV Host, Nutritionist and Author.

PGX - Healthy Weight Control.

Alive - A Natural Health and Wellness Magazine.

Vista Magazine - A Canadian Magazine Conceived for the Health-and-nutrition-savvy Reader.

In a Vegetarian Kitchen with Nava Atlas - Recipes, articles, opinions and information from renowned vegetarain chef, Nava Atlas.  

Vegetarian Resource Group - A non-profit organization dedicated to educating the public on vegetarianism and the interrelated issues of health, nutrition, ecology, ethics, and world hunger.

The Vegan Chef - This website is devoted to this wonderful way of eating, with animal-free recipes created from a vegan chef's perspective.
